transcript.text:
Hello everyone
I've been craving to eat sushi train (conveyor belt sushi)
It's called Enter6 located in Anyang
Leggo~
I'm really hungry right now
Because I had to do a medical check up (Endoscopy)
So I didn't eat anything since 9 o'clock yesterday
My stomach kinda feels weird after
It's like I butterflies
I'm not too sure if I can eat a lot
I feel weird
[Anyang Enter6 Sushiro]
I am so hungry right now because I had to starve for the Endoscopy
I feel very gassy
I don't think I can eat a lot
I'll eat what I can

[Getting ready to feast]
Hot! It's hot!
That looks good!
Soy sauce shrimp
There's a variety of sushi here
It was empty just now
They are sending in a new batch
It's so good..
Flounder fin! I need to eat this
[Happy]
This one is big!
Huge!
The marinated shrimp was okay..
I think this rail is just for me
I was busy snatching the food in other places, but I don't need to do that here
Let's order some drinks

[Ends up ordering more sushi]
What is this?
I can't select anymore
[4 orders per table at a time]
That's all it can take for now So just 4 orders
It's coming
This isn't the swordfish belly that I know
This is more like a tuna It's chewy
It's tartare
That's a must-have
It doesn't look like steak tartare
So maybe it's not a steak tartare?
More coming!
What is this?
Oh no
[Missed a plate from being distracted]

Where did it go? I missed it
This is the plate you missed
Oh, thank you
I can't take it out
Let's drink the soup
I'm not sure what kind of fish this is
Did I order this?
It looks good regardless So I'll eat it
Did she bring it to me because it tastes good?
Very good
Can I eat this in 1 bite?
[Yes I can]
Can't forget about the tuna belly
Check out the marbling
It's so good
What is this?

It's a huge prawn
What is this?
It tastes so good
There's spicy seasoned prawn and soy sauce marinated prawn The prawns taste good
This is the soy sauce
It's a good size
It's so tasty I like the spicy one better
I'm going to order more shrimp
I don't really eat shrimp when I come to sushi train restaurants
I'm going to eat more shrimp
1 spicy prawn, I want some eel too!
Salmon belly for sure
Neobiani sounds good (Marinated beef)
It would've been better if their rice portions were smaller
The ratio is correct because the meat (fish) is big
I like my sushi with a little bit of rice

Nice!
Salmon Check out the marbling on it
That's amazing
Ta-da Eel
Please don't fall
Prawn (x3) More prawn
2 orders of prawn
And I want the Neobiani
It's going to be delicious
There's beef tataki here I'm going to get that too
Neobiani
That looks juicy
I almost missed it
I love aged kimchi
My nostrils are moving?
Neobiani!

Yum
This is kind of like
When you get a spoonful of white rice
And putting the piece of marinated meat (Neobiani) on top
Yes, the Neobiani tastes great
It's the best with warm white rice
Salmon belly
I'm going to order more after this order
I will make 2 orders in a row
You guys know the drill, right? You have to eat a half-time dessert at buffets
I'm going to order my half-time dessert
Strawberry ice cream~
So good
Delicious
Do you guys remember the cockle I ate a while ago?
Butter-grilled cockle

Yummy It's really tasty
My half-time dessert Ice cream
Look at this!
Lettuce wrap with aged kimchi and pork jowl
One bite!
That's so delicious
Amazing! I'm going to order that again!
1 more order of cockle as well
It's all coming at once
Cockle moshi moshi(?) What am I saying?
Is there a such thing?
I need to get 1 more of that It's so good
Delicious
It has mushrooms
Beef skirt
And garlic flakes

Very yummy I need to order more
Quickly Move quickly
Beef skirt with mushroom
The sauce is just amazing
What should I order next?
I need to order before I finish eating all of this
This time,
Butter grilled cockle
It's so tasty
Cooked prawn
I was curious and wanted to try this since their prawns were incredible
Let's see how the cooked one tastes like
It smells like lobster
As expected It's delicious
I can keep eating the spicy seasoned prawn It's the best
I will eat all the prawns here

Tasty prawn! Tasty prawn!
That woke me up
Oh the pineapple is kinda sour
Sour.. Pineapple
I did a conveyor belt sushi mukbang today
I don't think I can eat much because of the endoscopy exam
I will stop here
Thanks everyone~
[75 plates total]
[173,200 Won (~$156 USD)] Subtitles by Hyun Choi antharoni@gmail.com
